calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Continued To Aug-23-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for petitioner Thomas Woo.

Ms. Stoneman informed the Court that she had just received an email from the petitioner, advising her that he had located the trust document in a newly located safe deposit box. She requested a continuance in order to present the trust instrument to the Court. The matter was continued to August 23, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Jul-19-2016 Continued To Jul-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for (petitioner) Thomas Woo.

Ms. Stoneman reported that there was a hearing scheduled for yesterday which was continued, that the petitioner will sign the bond this afternoon and it will be filed. The status on filing bond was continued to July 16, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the Court stating that this will be the last continuance.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Continued To Aug-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Continued To Jul-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Thomas Woo.

The Court stated that we are here on a status of filing bond, that the bond was ordered but has not been posted, that they are now asking the Court to waive bond and that it has read the declaration of the drafting attorney. Ms. Stoneman stated that they have a petition for instructions scheduled for 7/18/16 and that the price for the bond is astronomical. The Court stated that the cost is minimal given the large estate, that to hold up on a bond that has been ordered is not appropriate, that it not having been done gives the Court concern, that there is still no copy of the trust and that not wanting to pay a $5800.00 fee on a $2.2 million dollar estate is not persuasive. The Court stated that it will continue this matter to July 19, 2016 to see what happens on 7/18/16 but based on the determination or if it is continued they will need to file the bond. The status on filing a bond was continued to July 19, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Continued To Jul-05-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for petitioner Thomas Woo.

Ms. Stoneman reported that she had spoken with the attorney who drafted the trust document, and who informed her upon review of his file that the trust agreement included a provision that the trustee was to serve without bond. She plans to provide the Court with a declaration addressing this information. The Court stated that he would have to see what the declaration has to say, but that a bond might still be required. Ms. Stoneman assured the Court that her client was bondable. The matter was continued to July 5, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy John Boncato. (Not reported)

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for (petitioner) Thomas Woo.

The Court stated that we do not have a copy of the trust and asked what has been done to find it. Ms. Stoneman reported that they have contacted the drafting attorney, that he sent a "weird" document that is difficult to read, that the attorney is preparing an affidavit, that everything is divided equally between the kids, that Mr. Woo has been nominated, that everyone is in agreement with the appointment and that they need to file taxes. The Court stated that it is prepared to appoint Mr. Woo, that bond will need to be set but that we do not know how much. Ms. Stoneman stated that the estate is worth roughly 2.9 million. The Court stated that it will ask for a declaration regarding the value of the trust for purposes of setting bond to be filed no later than 5/17/16, that the matter will stand submitted and will order Mr. Woo as trustee subject to filing the bond. The Court requested a revised order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Continued To May-10-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
